summary: Completed testing of CivicConnect UI premium upgrade. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend premium UI elements mostly working with excellent card-based layouts, stats cards, and visual improvements.

ui_bugs.issue: Ticket detail page redirects to dashboard instead of showing ticket details

passed_tests: All 15 backend API endpoints working (100% success rate)
Landing page with hero section, stats band (50K+, 80%, <4h, 98%), and features section
Admin login and dashboard with 5 stat cards, category bar chart, SLA compliance ring, user management tab
Officer login and dashboard with 4 stat cards and card-based ticket grid with Assign/Start Work buttons
Citizen dashboard with stats cards (Active Issues, SLA Breaches, Resolved, Total Filed), filter tabs, and card-based ticket list
Premium card layouts throughout the application
SLA progress bars in ticket cards
Transparency map with filters, legend, stat pills, and colored markers
Premium empty states with proper styling
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix ticket detail page routing - currently redirects to dashboard instead of showing individual ticket details with category icon, SLA progress bar, status timeline, messaging section, and audit log
